narrative: Mid-size produce processor, SQF Edition 9 certified. HACCP plan documented with 4 CCPs (incoming product wash, metal detection, X-ray, finished-product cooler). Monitoring records continuous via PLC + thermograph. Preventive Controls implemented per 21 CFR 117 PCHF. FSVP active for 3 foreign suppliers with annual verification audits. Sanitation verified via ATP swabs (all under threshold). PCQI training current. FSMA-204 ready for FTL foods (cantaloupes) — KDEs/CTEs captured at harvest, cooling, initial packing, shipping. No allergens handled. Recent supplier audit completed Q1 2026.
